publisher.name: JOM Services / Pest Pro Rid All

servers.name: BrioStack Operations MCP
servers.description: Full BrioStack pest-control field-operations data layer. Customers, appointments, invoices, services, AR snapshot, daily ops, employee roster, leads, branches.

auth.note: Contact publisher for API key. Key stored in pestpro/integrations/mcp-api-key (AWS SM us-east-1).

tools.name: search_customers
tools.description: Search customers by name, phone, email, or address

tools.name: get_customer_details
tools.description: Fetch full customer record by Briostack customer ID

tools.name: get_customer_full_profile
tools.description: Aggregate customer profile: account + services + appointments + invoices

tools.name: get_customer_services
tools.description: List active service plans for a customer

tools.name: list_customer_contact_methods
tools.description: Phone, email, and contact preferences on file

tools.name: list_appointments
tools.description: List appointments with filters (date range, status, branch, tech)

tools.name: get_appointment
tools.description: Fetch single appointment by ID

tools.name: service_appointment
tools.description: Create a new service appointment

tools.name: reschedule_appointment
tools.description: Reschedule an existing appointment to a new date/time

tools.name: open_appointment
tools.description: Set appointment status to open/active

tools.name: close_appointment
tools.description: Mark appointment as completed/closed

tools.name: update_appointment_status
tools.description: Update appointment status field

tools.name: get_invoices
tools.description: List invoices for a customer with balance and line-item detail

tools.name: get_service_invoices
tools.description: Invoices linked to a specific service plan

tools.name: get_invoice_schedules
tools.description: Recurring invoice schedule for a customer

tools.name: get_ar_snapshot
tools.description: Accounts receivable snapshot — total outstanding, aging buckets

tools.name: get_billing_intelligence_reference
tools.description: Reference guide for billing field meanings and computation rules

tools.name: get_daily_ops_snapshot
tools.description: Today's operations summary: appointments, revenue, open tasks

tools.name: list_services
tools.description: All service types offered

tools.name: list_service_categories
tools.description: Service category taxonomy

tools.name: list_employees
tools.description: Employee roster with roles and branches

tools.name: list_branches
tools.description: Branch/office locations

tools.name: list_leads
tools.description: Open leads pipeline

tools.name: list_communications
tools.description: Communication log for a customer (calls, texts, notes)

tools.name: brio_raw_get
tools.description: Pass-through HTTP GET to any BrioStack REST endpoint

tools.name: brio_raw_post
tools.description: Pass-through HTTP POST (creates new records)

tools.name: brio_raw_patch
tools.description: Pass-through HTTP PATCH (partial updates — verified working on /appointments)

tools.name: brio_raw_put
tools.description: Pass-through HTTP PUT (full replace)

tools.name: brio_raw_delete
tools.description: Pass-through HTTP DELETE

tools.name: brio_raw_options
tools.description: Discover supported methods on any endpoint

tools.name: brio_get_openapi_spec
tools.description: Fetch the full BrioStack OpenAPI specification

tools.name: brio_rate_status
tools.description: Current API rate limit usage (20 req/60 s)

servers.name: CardPointe Payments MCP
servers.description: CardPointe / CardConnect payment processing. Authorize, capture, void, refund, ACH, stored profiles, deposit reporting.

auth.note: Contact publisher for API key. Key stored in pestpro/integrations/mcp-api-key (AWS SM us-east-1).

tools.name: cardpointe_authorize
tools.description: Authorize a credit/debit card charge (hold funds, do not capture)

tools.name: cardpointe_capture
tools.description: Capture a previously authorized transaction

tools.name: cardpointe_void
tools.description: Void an authorized or unsettled transaction

tools.name: cardpointe_refund
tools.description: Refund a settled transaction (partial or full)

tools.name: cardpointe_inquire
tools.description: Inquire on a transaction by retref

tools.name: cardpointe_inquire_by_order
tools.description: Look up transaction by order ID

tools.name: cardpointe_offline_payment
tools.description: Record an offline/manual payment

tools.name: cardpointe_ach_payment
tools.description: Submit an ACH bank debit via BlueChex

tools.name: cardpointe_create_profile
tools.description: Save a card or bank account to a stored profile (tokenize)

tools.name: cardpointe_get_profile
tools.description: Retrieve a stored payment profile by profile ID

tools.name: cardpointe_delete_profile
tools.description: Remove a stored payment profile

tools.name: cardpointe_search_profile_by_party_id
tools.description: Find stored profiles by partyId (= Briostack customerId)

tools.name: cardpointe_account_status
tools.description: Check merchant account status and configuration

tools.name: cardpointe_get_deposit
tools.description: Get deposit/funding report for a date range

tools.name: cardpointe_settle_status
tools.description: Check settlement batch status

servers.name: Agency / GHL Operations MCP
servers.description: GoHighLevel (GHL) CRM & marketing operations. Contacts, conversations, calendars, pipelines, AI bots, voice agents, knowledge bases, social media, invoices, Stripe.
servers.note: Currently runs as a local stdio MCP. Remote hosting planned.

auth.note: Credentials via AWS Secrets Manager key pestpro/integrations/ghl
